name: CMS ENERGY CORP
summary: CMS Energy Corporation is a Michigan-based energy holding company, parent of Consumers Energy Company and NorthStar Clean Energy. Consumers Energy provides electric and natural gas utility services to Michigan customers, operating generation, transmission, and distribution infrastructure including natural gas, coal, and renewable energy assets. NorthStar Clean Energy operates non-utility energy businesses including wind, solar, and cogeneration facilities.

products.name: Electric Utility Service
products.description: Generation, transmission, and distribution of electricity to Michigan customers via Consumers Energy.

products.name: Natural Gas Utility Service
products.description: Distribution and supply of natural gas to Michigan customers via Consumers Energy.

products.name: Appliance Service Plan (ASP)
products.description: Appliance service and maintenance plan offered to customers.

products.name: Gas Customer Choice (GCC)
products.description: Program allowing gas customers to purchase gas from alternative suppliers.

products.name: Retail Open Access (ROA)
products.description: Program allowing electric customers to choose alternative electric suppliers.

products.name: Renewable Energy
products.description: Wind and solar power generation assets operated through NorthStar Clean Energy subsidiaries.

products.name: Cogeneration (MCV Facility)
products.description: 1,647-MW natural gas-fueled combined-cycle cogeneration facility operated by MCVPartnership under PPA.

products.name: Securitization Bonds
products.description: Financing instruments issued by special-purpose subsidiaries authorized by MPSC statute.

partnerships.description: Joint ownership of Ludington pumped-storage plant with Consumers Energy.
Joint ownership of J.H. Campbell Unit 3, holding a 4.80% interest.
Joint ownership of J.H. Campbell Unit 3, holding a 1.89% interest.
Power purchase agreement between Consumers and MCVPartnership for 1,647-MW cogeneration facility.
